name: Pet Factory Twistedz 3 to 3.5-inch Beefhide Mini Rolls Beef Flavored Dog Hard Chews, 14 count
description: Put a tasty twist on snacktime with Pet Factory Twistedz 3 to 3.5-inch Beefhide Mini Rolls Beef Flavored Dog Hard Chews! These two-in-one treats combine real meat and American beefhide to create a flavorful, natural chew that dogs find hard to resist! Twistedz mini rolls are the paw-fect choice for avid chewers. Each beefy bite is 99% digestible and contains no harmful additives or preservatives. With paw-rental supervision, these chews offer a tasty, fun and satisfying workout for your dog’s wild instincts!
